name: lotus-delight-platform
description: Production-ready MERN stack e-commerce platform for Lotus Delight.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace client" "npm run dev --workspace server"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace client && npm run lint --workspace server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace client && npm run typecheck --workspace server
